goal: Keep Feishu cards as an engineering-grade runtime layer with registered templates, deterministic triggers, health gates, versioned rollout, rollback, runtime telemetry, restart validation, and real Feishu grey validation handoff.

acceptance_criteria.description: Every required card type is registered with card_type, version, owner, builder, triggers, fallback, and upgrade metadata.
Every registered card builder can generate a sample card without importing AstrBot or requiring live Feishu credentials.
Casual messages route to casual reply cards, while task-like messages route to waiting cards without mixing the two paths.
Card versions can be listed, advanced into grey rollout, and rolled back without editing template code.
Runtime card sends and failures are recorded so a successful test always has a next-step handoff and a failed test preserves fallback behavior.
acceptance_criteria.verification: scripts-tools/card-grey-push.py --receive-id-type union_id --receive-id <receiver> --card-type casual_reply --card-type thinking_waiting && scripts-tools/card-system-health.py --events --limit 20 && scripts-tools/card-system-health.py --next-step

acceptance_criteria.description: AstrBot safe restart runs the card system health gate before closing maintenance and continuing grey rollout.
The engineering SOP documents how to add, upgrade, grey validate, rollback, and future-proof card templates.
acceptance_criteria.verification: DOC/05_Dashboard与卡片/卡片系统工程级升级与验收方案_2026-06-04.md

acceptance_criteria.description: Runtime plugins and grey tools send cards through the shared card runtime gateway instead of ad-hoc script-only Feishu calls.
